mapper.select: SELECT seq_id_verifications.NEXTVAL FROM dual
SELECT seq_product_subscriptions.NEXTVAL FROM dual
SELECT seq_electronic_signatures.NEXTVAL FROM dual
SELECT seq_foreign_accounts.NEXTVAL FROM dual
SELECT seq_fx_balances.NEXTVAL FROM dual

SELECT product_no, active, product_name, product_type, base_rate, max_rate, min_period_month, max_period_month, min_amount, max_amount, target_large, target_detail, description, interest_payment_type, product_tendency, status, product_start_dt, product_end_dt FROM products WHERE product_no = #{productNo} AND active = 'Y'

SELECT TO_CHAR(pt.terms_no) AS terms_code, pt.product_no, ptv.terms_title, tt.type_name AS terms_type, pt.required_yn, ptv.pdf_path, ptv.terms_text, pt.use_yn FROM product_terms pt JOIN product_term_versions ptv ON pt.terms_no = ptv.terms_no LEFT JOIN terms_types tt ON pt.type_no = tt.type_no WHERE pt.product_no = #{productNo} AND pt.use_yn = 'Y' AND ptv.is_current = 'Y' AND ptv.effective_dt <= SYSDATE AND (ptv.expired_dt IS NULL OR ptv.expired_dt > SYSDATE) ORDER BY pt.required_yn DESC, pt.terms_no

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_terms pt JOIN product_term_versions ptv ON pt.terms_no = ptv.terms_no WHERE pt.product_no = #{productNo} AND pt.required_yn = 'Y' AND pt.use_yn = 'Y' AND ptv.is_current = 'Y' AND ptv.effective_dt <= SYSDATE AND (ptv.expired_dt IS NULL OR ptv.expired_dt > SYSDATE)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_terms pt JOIN product_term_versions ptv ON pt.terms_no = ptv.terms_no WHERE pt.product_no = #{productNo} AND pt.required_yn = 'Y' AND pt.use_yn = 'Y' AND ptv.is_current = 'Y' AND ptv.effective_dt <= SYSDATE AND (ptv.expired_dt IS NULL OR ptv.expired_dt > SYSDATE)
AND TO_CHAR(pt.terms_no) IN
#{termsCode}
AND 1 = 0

SELECT ptv.terms_title FROM product_term_versions ptv WHERE TO_CHAR(ptv.terms_no) = #{termsCode} AND ptv.is_current = 'Y' AND ptv.effective_dt <= SYSDATE AND (ptv.expired_dt IS NULL OR ptv.expired_dt > SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO id_verifications ( verification_no, user_no, product_no, verification_status, verification_method, ocr_provider, matched_name_yn, matched_birth_yn, fail_reason, verified_dt, expired_dt, created_dt ) VALUES ( #{verificationNo}, #{userNo}, #{productNo}, #{verificationStatus}, #{verificationMethod}, #{ocrProvider}, #{matchedNameYn}, #{matchedBirthYn}, #{failReason}, #{verifiedDt}, #{expiredDt}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_subscriptions ps JOIN user_sensitive_infos target_usi ON target_usi.user_no = #{userNo} JOIN user_sensitive_infos joined_usi ON joined_usi.user_no = ps.user_no AND joined_usi.rrn_masked = target_usi.rrn_masked WHERE ps.product_no = #{productNo} AND ps.subscription_status NOT IN ('해지', '만기', '취소')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM foreign_accounts fa JOIN foreign_account_balances fab ON fab.fx_acnt_id = fa.fx_acnt_no WHERE fa.user_no = #{userNo} AND fa.account_no LIKE '333-02-%' AND fab.balance > 0

SELECT fa.account_no AS accountNo, fab.currency_code AS currencyCode, fab.balance AS balance FROM foreign_accounts fa JOIN foreign_account_balances fab ON fab.fx_acnt_id = fa.fx_acnt_no WHERE fa.user_no = #{userNo} AND fa.account_no LIKE '333-02-%' AND fab.currency_code = #{currencyCode} AND fab.balance > 0 ORDER BY fa.account_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_subscriptions ( subscription_no, product_no, user_no, rate_no, type, acnt_no, currency_code, amount, period_month, verification_no, subscription_status, subscribed_dt, maturity_dt, applied_rate, rate_changed_dt ) VALUES ( #{subscriptionNo}, #{productNo}, #{userNo}, #{rateNo}, #{type}, #{acntNo}, #{currencyCode}, #{amount}, #{periodMonth}, #{verificationNo}, #{subscriptionStatus}, SYSDATE, #{maturityDt}, #{appliedRate}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO foreign_accounts ( fx_acnt_no, acnt_pw, bank_name, account_no, user_no, limit_once, limit_daily, updated_dt ) VALUES ( #{fxAcntNo}, #{acntPw}, #{bankName}, #{accountNo}, #{userNo}, #{limitOnce}, #{limitDaily}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO foreign_account_balances ( balance_no, fx_acnt_id, currency_code, balance, updated_dt ) VALUES ( #{balanceNo}, #{fxAcntId}, #{currencyCode}, #{balance}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO required_terms_agreements ( required_agreement_no, subscription_no, terms_no, agreed_yn, agreed_at ) VALUES ( seq_req_terms_agr.NEXTVAL, #{subscriptionNo}, TO_NUMBER(#{termsCode}), 'Y', SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO optional_terms_agreements ( optional_agreement_no, subscription_no, terms_no, terms_title, agreed_yn, agreed_dt ) VALUES ( seq_opt_terms_agr.NEXTVAL, #{subscriptionNo}, TO_NUMBER(#{termsCode}), #{termsTitle}, 'Y', SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO electronic_signatures ( signature_no, subscription_no, user_no, verification_no, signature_path, signed_content, signed_dt ) VALUES ( #{signatureNo}, #{subscriptionNo}, #{userNo}, #{verificationNo}, #{signaturePath}, #{signedContent}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT ps.subscription_no, p.product_name, u.name_ko AS user_name, ps.acnt_no, ps.currency_code, ps.amount, ps.period_month, ps.applied_rate, ps.subscribed_dt, ps.maturity_dt, ps.subscription_status FROM product_subscriptions ps JOIN products p ON ps.product_no = p.product_no JOIN users u ON ps.user_no = u.user_no WHERE ps.subscription_no = #{subscriptionNo}

SELECT ps.subscription_no AS subscriptionNo, ps.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_type AS productType, ps.acnt_no AS accountNo, ps.currency_code AS currencyCode, ps.amount AS subscriptionAmount, fab.balance AS accountBalance, ps.subscribed_dt AS subscribedDt, ps.maturity_dt AS maturityDt, ps.subscription_status AS subscriptionStatus FROM product_subscriptions ps JOIN products p ON p.product_no = ps.product_no LEFT JOIN foreign_accounts fa ON fa.account_no = ps.acnt_no AND fa.user_no = ps.user_no LEFT JOIN foreign_account_balances fab ON fab.fx_acnt_id = fa.fx_acnt_no AND fab.currency_code = ps.currency_code WHERE ps.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY ps.subscribed_dt DESC, ps.subscription_no DESC

SELECT coupon_no AS couponNo, user_no AS userNo, product_no AS productNo, preferential_rate AS preferentialRate, is_used AS isUsed, issued_dt AS issuedDt, used_dt AS usedDt FROM coupon WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND is_used = 'N' AND (product_no IS NULL OR product_no = #{productNo}) ORDER BY issued_dt DESC

SELECT coupon_no AS couponNo, user_no AS userNo, product_no AS productNo, preferential_rate AS preferentialRate, is_used AS isUsed, issued_dt AS issuedDt, used_dt AS usedDt FROM coupon WHERE coupon_no = #{couponNo} AND user_no = #{userNo} AND is_used = 'N' AND (product_no IS NULL OR product_no = #{productNo})
